title: axinaea oblongifolia
intro: Axinaea oblongifolia, also known as the False Hedyosmum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. The medicinal properties of Axinaea oblongifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Axinaea oblongifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Axinaea oblongifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
